title: Compass Quest: Pathfinders Pack
description: Compass Quest: Pathfinders Pack is a mod pack designed to enhance exploration and adventure in your game. It focuses on expanding the player's journey through new biomes, structures, and challenges. With a variety of mods included, you'll find new tools.
body: Compass Quest: Pathfinders Pack is a mod pack designed to enhance exploration and adventure in your game. It focuses on expanding the player's journey through new biomes, structures, and challenges. With a variety of mods included, you'll find new tools, maps, and navigation aids to help you chart your course and uncover hidden treasures. Whether you're seeking ancient ruins, hidden dungeons, or simply a more immersive world, this pack provides the resources and features to make every expedition exciting and rewarding.
